deep-nourishing-cream.title: Gorgeous clean products that actually work
deep-nourishing-cream.body: Good, clean non toxic products that actually work. I used the deep nourishing cream and it made a difference to my dry skin in just two weeks. It's helped myself and my daughter with eczema too. Very hydrating and soft cream - not greasy. And the smell is just devine.

deep-nourishing-cream.title: Love it!
deep-nourishing-cream.body: It was so nice to meet you at the exhibition I bought the cream from you. It's so good, my hands feel so soft since using it and so I used it on my son's dry cheeks and it's been helping so much. Thank you for creating such a great product and I can't wait to see the affects after a month.

deep-nourishing-cream.title: Absolutely love the products
deep-nourishing-cream.body: I use all their products and it is amazing! Really gentle & nourishing on my sensitive skin. Love it!

deep-nourishing-cream.title: Magic in the jar
deep-nourishing-cream.body: I'm truly amazed by this gorgeous deep nourishing cream! It has worked wonders for my son's eczema flare-ups — his skin is now much softer, calmer, and far less irritated. With regular use, I've seen a complete transformation in his skin's texture and comfort. Knowing that this cream is made entirely from natural ingredients without any harsh chemicals gives me real peace of mind. Thank you, Inherited, for creating such a beautiful and effective product.

overnight-rejuvenation-cream.title: This rejuvenating night cream has become my favorite
I love this night cream!
overnight-rejuvenation-cream.body: Feels like luxury each evening. Divine scent, smooth and glowing skin. Noticeably improves complexion. Love this product!

overnight-rejuvenation-cream.title: An amazing discovery
overnight-rejuvenation-cream.body: Used deep nourishing cream previously with great results. This night cream is stellar — skin looks incredibly healthy. Absorbs quickly.

overnight-rejuvenation-cream.title: So good!
overnight-rejuvenation-cream.body: Hesitant with sensitive skin, but noticed improvement within days. Skin looks excellent and feels amazing.

overnight-rejuvenation-cream.title: Husband 1 : Wife 0
overnight-rejuvenation-cream.body: Amazing product. Received unexpected compliments about skin appearance. Highly recommended for dramatic improvement.

radiance-serum.title: My favorite night oil — my second purchase
radiance-serum.body: My favorite night oil, this was my second purchase.

radiance-serum.title: My skin looks great
radiance-serum.body: This is the best product I have used for my skin. I am 78 and can't believe how my skin has started to look so youthful again.

radiance-serum.title: So glad I tried it
radiance-serum.body: I started using this facial ghee serum because my daughter recommended it and I'm glad I did. It melts into the skin, feels soothing, and has brought back a lovely softness to my face.

radiance-serum.title: Love it!
radiance-serum.body: I love, love, love this serum! Made my skin so much brighter in just a few uses!

radiance-serum.title: Absolutely Amazing!
radiance-serum.body: Why did I wait so long to buy this? I have been besotted with the deep nourishing cream for several years now and thought that was more than enough for my face. The softness is as outstanding as the cream but so much lighter on application and is non greasy. My face is visibly plumper, so darn smooth and the glow is unreal. I applied it as soon as it arrived and as I type this at 6pm, my face is still soft and has a glow. There is no shine or greasiness at all.

ghee-oat-cleansing-balm.title: Game changer!
ghee-oat-cleansing-balm.body: I bought this for my husband to use in the morning and he loves using it! He says it smells like being in a spa and his skin looks bright since starting it! Definitely going to be a staple!

ghee-oat-cleansing-balm.title: Love this balm!
ghee-oat-cleansing-balm.body: I love the Victoria Beckham eyeliner as it's waterproof but the flip side is it's a pain to remove! This cleansing balm is absolutely incredible — it removes the eyeliner effortlessly and doesn't leave my skin feeling dry like most make-up removers.

ghee-oat-cleansing-balm.title: I'm in love!
ghee-oat-cleansing-balm.body: This weekend I just bought the brand new cleansing balm and I don't know how I coped without it! It literally melts off the make-up and I wiped it off with a soft cloth!

ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.title: Miraculous!
ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.body: Your foot cream is a miraculous cream truly. I have underfloor heating and since moving into this property, my feet have been dry and the only thing that works for them is copious amounts of Vaseline. Even a concoction of castor oil, almond oil and rose hip oil didn't work. Your cream has made my feet supple and soft within the second use. A big thank you from me.

ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.title: Luxury for your feet
ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.body: This is my favourite foot cream. I'm usually very reluctant to try new foot creams because they don't work, but this one is a winner. I'm all for using more natural products on your skin, as I'm a Nutritional Therapist and am very conscious about all the chemicals we put on our body. I love a brand that is innovative like Inherited but at the same time draws on rooted traditions.

ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.title: Great product
ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.body: Best product I have used for foot care — highly recommend.

ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.title: Helped my battered feet!
ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.body: I do karate bare feet so my feet get battered! I use the foot cream after every training session and my feet have never felt better!

ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.title: Amazing Foot Cream
ultimate-soothing-foot-cream.body: I bought a gift set with 3 small creams in and my parents have continued to buy the Foot cream. It's an amazing cream and really does wonders for your feet — helps with cracked and dry skin leaving them very soft.

nourishing-lip-care-set.title: Amazing multi purpose
nourishing-lip-care-set.body: Not just nourishing on lips — I use it for multiple purposes such as dry skin patches from dermatitis, elbows and around nail bed after toe nail injury. Magical!

nourishing-lip-care-set.title: AMAZING!
nourishing-lip-care-set.body: This has transformed my skincare routine and I can't leave the house without the balm. It's honestly so moisturising and luscious — way better than Vaseline as it softens as well as locks in moisture without leaving sticky residue.

nourishing-lip-care-set.title: I wasn't sure till I tried it
nourishing-lip-care-set.body: I was skeptical using ghee on my lips because I do not like the smell of ghee. But this lip balm changed my opinion on it. I use it all the time now. 100% recommend.

nourishing-lip-care-set.title: Didn't know what I needed was right here!
nourishing-lip-care-set.body: The lip scrub is not as abrasive as expected. With the balm at night, lips feel much softer in the mornings. Lipstick isn't caking anymore. Perfect size for handbag or travel.

nourishing-lip-care-set.title: Found my holy grail lip balm
nourishing-lip-care-set.body: The texture and smell are wonderful and it keeps lips hydrated for longer. I have tried many lip balms over the years but I am in love with this one. Now never without it!

essentials-gift-set.title: Love it!!
essentials-gift-set.body: Absolutely amazing! The travel size is so easy to carry around, especially on summer holiday. The products are always a hit. 10/10 for sure.
